name: spd_Photon_125
title: PX-02 "Zenith" Experimental Photon Drive
description:
Despite being massless, photons do in fact carry momentum.
his engine takes in huge amounts of electricity and uses it to
eat a block of materlal to a very high temperature, causing it
o give off photons as blackbody radiation. These photons
hoot out of the engine to produce a tiny amount of thrust. So
ven though the thrust is pitiful, it technically requires no
nboard propellant.

name: spd_Photon_5
title: PX-10 "Omega" Experimental Photon Drive
description:
Taking the photon drive principle to the extreme, this engine
needs a truly horrifying amount of electricity to run but the
results can be worth it. Definitely do not point the exhaust of
this thing at anything you care about.

name: spd_Photon_625
title: PX-01 "Aura" Experimental Photon Drive
description:
A smaller photon drive, for when you want to accelerate even
tinler payloads a snall's pace. This drive takes less electricity to
run, but is slightly less efficlent in terms of thrust per unit of
electric charge than larger engines. It is not recommended that
this engine is used as an actual means of illuminating an area,
it will probably be set on fire.
